svg.title: MedSearchPro Data Aggregation Flow
svg.desc: Sequential enrichment pipeline: drug name → RXNorm → FDA openFDA → MedlinePlus Connect → DailyMed → merged JSON output
svg.text: enrich_medications.py · 4 APIs · RXNorm → FDA openFDA → MedlinePlus Connect → DailyMed → medications_enriched.json
one object per drug · all fields flat-merged
id · name · tradeNames · category · description · sideEffects
× 540 drugs · up to 6 API calls each · ~25–30 min total
--limit N for testing · --resume to continue interrupted runs
considerations from MedlinePlus takes precedence · patientTeaching from DailyMed · fdaIndicationsUsage falls back to original description
No field written by two sources · each API owns its output fields exclusively
0.4s delay between calls · 4–6 calls per drug · RXNorm → FDA → MedlinePlus → DailyMed
Each color = exclusive owner · LOINC codes used for DailyMed SPL section mapping · all fields flat-merged into one object per drug
